products.name: GLACIAR Controller 10
products.function: Centralized gas detection management — receives 4-20mA signals from up to 10 detectors, manages alarms, relays, and BMS communication via Modbus.

display.value: 2x8 digit LCD, multi-colour backlight (Red=Alarm, Yellow=Fault, Blue=Normal)

installCable.value: 2 core 1.5mm2 or 2.5mm2, SWA/MICC/SY/CY screened or similar

specs.maxDetectorsPerHighway: Up to 128 addressable nodes across 6 highways
specs.cableType: 2 core SWA, MICC, SY, CY Screened or similar

specs.note: Drives external beacon/sounder directly
Additional relay for any alarm condition
BMS integration output ONLY — NOT for detector input. Sends GC10 data to Building Management System.
Second RS-485 BMS output port for redundancy or separate BMS — NOT for detector input.

connectionRules.detectorConnection: 4-20mA analog only (10 input channels). MIDI connects via J1 analog output → GC10 analog input.
connectionRules.modbusPort: Output to BMS only — NOT for detector input. RS-485 Modbus sends GC10 data to Building Management System.
connectionRules.alertConnection: Controller relays drive alerts centrally. 1 beacon on Relay 1, 1 siren on Relay 2 (typical). Relays are configurable.
connectionRules.alertsNeeded: 1 beacon + 1 siren connected to controller relays (centralized, regardless of detector count)

products.name: GLACIAR MIDI IR CO2 10000ppm
products.function: Gas detection — standalone or via controller. Measures refrigerant gas concentration and triggers alarms via relays.

specs.note: Auto-detects polarity for DC (+/-) and AC (L/N)

specs.cableType: 3-core, 2 twisted pair + ground, shielded, 120 ohm impedance

specs.note: Used with rotary switch for configuration, shows selected parameter value

specs.states: Normal=Green steady, Warning=Green+Yellow steady, Alarm=all ON, Fault=Red+Yellow, Warmup=Green blink, Bluetooth=Green double blink

specs.note: Internal connector for built-in sensor module. Not for external wiring.

specs.functions: Warning level, Alarm level, Modbus address, Alarm delay, Analogue output type, Reset mode, Modbus config

connectionRules.modbusUsage: Direct to BMS (standalone/without GC10) or for service/monitoring only — NOT used when MIDI is connected to GC10
connectionRules.alertConnection: Each MIDI relay drives exactly 1 alert device. In standalone mode: 1 alert on Warning relay + 1 alert on Alarm relay. With controller: MIDI relays typically unused for alerts (controller manages centrally).
connectionRules.powerAdapterRequired: When site voltage is 230V AC (MIDI needs 24V)
